pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and modernize the framework stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with newer JDK features; upgrading is required to run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against JDK 21; keeping it at 17 would result in incorrect bytecode version or build failures if strict checks are enabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Spring Boot 3.x dependency management; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement.
